name: intdb
description: Инструменты intData DBA для DB doctor, migration status, SQL/apply planning и local smoke через intdata_cli.

interface.longDescription: Guarded MCP-обёртка intData DBA над operator CLI intdb. Read-only проверки разрешены без mutation approval; apply/dump/restore/local-test требуют owner approval и disposable/local context.
defaultPrompt: Спланировать local DB smoke без production state.
